_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of Pathogenic Missense Mutations of NF1 Using Computational Approaches.

_contextSnippet: Using PredictSNP, the 204 mutations were analyzed and categorized primarily into deleterious or neutral categories. Among the other computational tools, PredictSNP...designated 123...as deleterious
details: Analyzed 204 mutations and categorized them into deleterious or neutral categories, designated 123 mutations as deleterious
